name: Paruvu
overview: Years after Sudheer and Pallavi are disowned by their families for defying the caste system, a tragedy brings them back to their hometown. Soon, they find themselves entangled in an accidental death.

trailers.title: PARUVU Official Trailer(Telugu) | A ZEE5 Original | Naga Babu,Nivetha Pethuraj | Premieres 14th June
